description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style metal ladder frame, likely designed for fixed installation in an urban or construction environment. The structure consists of two parallel side rails connected by six evenly spaced horizontal rungs, all made from rectangular metal tubing. The base of the ladder features wide, flat mounting plates for secure attachment to the ground or a platform, ensuring stability. The open, skeletal design allows for easy visibility and access through the frame, with no additional safety features such as handrails or anti-slip surfaces visible. The metallic surface appears unfinished or lightly treated, giving it a matte, slightly rough texture typical of galvanized or raw steel. This ladder is intended for heavy-duty use, possibly as part of an access system for maintenance or industrial equipment.
description: A heavy-duty, fixed metal ladder frame with six rungs and wide mounting plates, designed for industrial or urban installation. The open, rectangular structure is made of matte-finished steel tubing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the six horizontal rungs and the wide, flat mounting plates at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the ladder, the spacing between rungs, and the rectangular profile of the rails.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the rungs and mounting plates.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the length, rung spacing, and open frame structure.
